message:
test(core): add 15 metrics tests for primitives and snapshot types

Counter (+2): store/load, inc/add accumulation.
GaugeI64 (+2): add/set/load, negative values.
GaugeU64 (+2): add accumulation, fetch_max CAS loop.
Log2Histogram (+1): reset clears all state.
HttpMetrics (+2): record_response status bucketing, inflight tracking.
DbMetrics (+2): snapshot utilization_pct calculation, zero-total guard.
SystemMetrics (+1): snapshot round-trip.
global_metrics (+1): singleton returns same reference.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
